sessions.description: Project kickoff, architecture design, backend scaffold
Full 6-agent pipeline (agents.py) + ADK orchestrator — IntentAgent NLP, RankAgent weighted scoring, PriceAgent PKR formula, BookingAgent conflict detection, FollowupAgent lifecycle, haversine.py

React frontend — ChatWindow, AgentTrace, ProviderPicker, BookingCard, DemoBar, HeroSuggestions, PaymentSheet, AuthModal, agentEngine.js (client-side 6-agent pipeline), App.jsx two-phase flow, useAuth + useBookings hooks
Flutter customer app — Riverpod state, GoRouter navigation, Firebase Auth, Firestore services, mock_ai_service (26 providers offline), all screens, APK + web build

Flutter Worker app (Phone Auth, job overlay, earnings, Urdu chat), Firebase Firestore integration (providers/bookings/sessions collections, seed_firestore.py, security rules), Stripe payments, 3 bug fixes (CORS, Roman Urdu NLP, peak-hour surge), multi-turn ContextAgent memory, README, start.sh, final build — all 4 demo scenarios verified
